I haven’t even played it yet but it’s still the best game because bread is tasty🍞🍞🍞

So After Watching Other YouTubers Play This Game I Wanted To Try It Myself, What They Showed Was A Gorilla Tag Copy That Had A Good House Map. But Then I Played It And I Got A Generic Infection game which gorilla tag already HAD and unlike gorilla tags maps which give a Nintendo 64 or Playstation 1 Vibe To It this one makes my eyes hurt. Oh and the intro it is loud telling you the game is "better than gorilla tag" and has random roblox gameplay in the back AND MY EARS all I hear is the same 5 second thing across the map! And it's controls feel painful for a gorilla tag copy. And now I can talk about the messages he gives to negative reviews,  which are very self centered, he just says "No Your Hust Bad At The Game" Or "NO Bread Runners Is The Best Game" which isn't HELPFUL AT ALL. Which makes this feel like it's made by a Derranged Child. I don't recommend this game at all, TL;DR Put Your Volume ALL THE WAY DOWN when you install it and keep it like that forever, or just don't play the game.

This game,,,,,this game is the best game ever. for starters, you load the game right? BOOOM YOU GET THE BEST INTRO IN YOUR LIFE BLASTING SO LOUD THAT YOU CAN’T NOT LOVE IT! Next your in this room with the coolest paintings ever scattered across the house. But but once you look out side there is a Beautiful view of the Mountain you live on, showing you that your the richest bread in the world! Oh and the bread, I am a big bread fan and this is just amazing. The microwave has the most realistic bread ever in VR speaking of realistic the game is just that with graphics better then real life. Now I have I problem, I can’t give my soal to this game and I really want to so plz make this happen. But all in all you really outdone yourself. Please, please ignore the haters saying it’s a ripoff and not a good game, there wrong ok wrong. One more thing multiplayer is great. Thank you for making this.

reviews.review_title: Good game, but I literally cannot play
reviews.review_description: The first time I played this game it actually worked and it was an awesome game but then the second time I tried to play the keyboard didn’t spawn in and i wasn’t in a server, this happened multiple times so I had to reinstall the game and it worked after that… except that it only worked one time again, I then proceeded to reinstall it and it doesnt work even after reinstalling multiple times. Good game but fix the keyboard glitch cause I literally cannot play your game (technically I can play it but not in a server)

I was playing bread runners for the first time and I am immediately greeted with some loud backrooms music and everywhere I went it only got worse. Then there was a very cursed looking red piece of bread that stares at you restarting your game. I don't know if I was hacked or what, but it made me turn pale. The whole game also has a very eerie ambience to it. It is just empty and there is nobody there. Would have been fun if that didn't happen. Also, the little temple in desert is where I saw that bloody piece bread.

reviews.review_title: Good game I do enjoy it but 1 thing
reviews.review_description: There is quite a lot of lag and the movement gets stuck sometimes but still fun ig...
Even if it was a bad game (which it isn’t) it’s bread and you can’t complain about bread 👍

It’s a good game, I’ll give you that, but there are a lot of bugs you should consider fixing. for starters, multiplayer is broken. (Meaning I’ve been trying to go online for the past 30 minutes.) second, the intro when you reload the game can cause people with epilepsy to have seizures. The good things are that the graphics are good and the movement is nice.

developer_response.body: The online is just that it is full and the rest I'm fixing
